problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
hypothesis: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Spintronics. Spintronics for low-power data storage directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
